title: Emotional Echoes: Multilingual Typography Experiment
description: “Emotional Echoes” is an interactive generative art piece that visualizes six core emotions—happy, anxious, peaceful, angry, sad, hopeful—across five languages (English, Spanish, Japanese, Arabic, Hindi). A dynamic HSB gradient background smoothly transitions with each emotion, while floating “body sensation” particles and a circular typography display immerse you in the feeling. Hover-triggered character particles and an emotion wheel let you explore subtle visual and textual nuances of how different cultures express the same mood.
instructions:
Click anywhere on the canvas to cycle through the six emotions in sequence.

Hover your mouse over any floating word in the central ring to trigger tiny text‐particle bursts.

Click the emotion wheel at top‐right to jump directly to a specific emotion.
